policy: Adopters should promote a gofly release only when release evidence, readiness score, required checks, supply-chain artifacts, and rollback decisions all point to a reproducible local or CI gate.

supplyChainEnforcementRows.securityScan: module checksum verification plus archive SBOM review before binary mirroring
supplyChainEnforcementRows.provenanceEvidence: dist/checksums.txt is later covered by checksums-attestation before publication.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.publishDecision: Publish archives only when checksums and archive SBOM evidence are present and release-artifacts-check passes.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.blockDecision: Block publication when archives, checksums, or SBOM artifacts are missing from the release evidence index.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Reject the release artifact, pin the previous binary release, and rebuild from the tagged commit.

supplyChainEnforcementRows.securityScan: Trivy release image scan plus release Docker SBOM review
supplyChainEnforcementRows.provenanceEvidence: release Docker digests and SBOM are paired with docker-attestation before deployment promotion.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.publishDecision: Publish or deploy release images only by immutable digest after Docker SBOM and Trivy evidence pass.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.blockDecision: Block image promotion when digest evidence is missing or Trivy reports an unexplained release-blocking finding.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Keep the previous image digest pinned until Docker evidence, Trivy results, and mitigations are accepted.

supplyChainEnforcementRows.securityScan: attestation verification for checksum and release image subjects
supplyChainEnforcementRows.provenanceEvidence: GitHub provenance attestations must bind dist/checksums.txt and release Docker image digest subjects.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.publishDecision: Publish release notes only after checksum and Docker attestation verification artifacts are uploaded.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.blockDecision: Block publication when attestations are missing, mismatched, or do not bind the expected release subjects.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Rebuild and re-attest from the tagged commit or continue using the previous attested release.

supplyChainEnforcementRows.securityScan: govulncheck, gosec, race, benchmark, API compatibility, and governance dashboard release gates
supplyChainEnforcementRows.provenanceEvidence: governance dashboard records required-check drift closure and release evidence coverage before tag promotion.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.publishDecision: Allow tag promotion only when API, security, race, benchmark, and governance dashboard evidence remain release-blocking.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.blockDecision: Block tag promotion when any required check is skipped, removed from release prerequisites, or missing dashboard evidence.
supplyChainEnforcementRows.rollbackOrEscalation: Restore the missing gate, pin the previous release, or require explicit migration and risk notes before retrying.

decisions.adopterAction: Upgrade generated services only after API compatibility and governance dashboard evidence show stable contract surfaces.
decisions.rollbackOrEscalation: Pin the previous gofly version and require migration notes when API or generated contract evidence fails.

decisions.adopterAction: Publish or mirror only immutable archives and image digests with checksum, SBOM, digest, and provenance evidence.
decisions.rollbackOrEscalation: Reject publication and rebuild from the tagged commit when supply-chain artifacts or attestations are missing.

decisions.adopterAction: Block production rollout when security, race, or ratcheted benchmark evidence reports a release-blocking failure.
decisions.rollbackOrEscalation: Hold promotion and keep the previous deployment or digest pinned until the finding is fixed or explicitly accepted.

decisions.adopterAction: Use digest, Trivy, benchmark, and governance dashboard evidence to decide whether to roll forward, pin, or restore the previous release.
decisions.rollbackOrEscalation: Roll back to the previous known-good digest or binary release when deployment evidence cannot explain the regression.
